findings.description: Hint '電文処理' has no basis in the source. The source text for s9 mentions '各要求電文' and '電文中のリクエストID' as part of the メッセージング実行制御基盤 definition, but '電文処理' as a standalone term does not appear in the source.
findings.source_evidence: Source た行 section only contains: 'メッセージング実行制御基盤' and '取引単体テスト' entries. '電文処理' is not listed as a term or phrase.
